proposal1.heroHeadline: Wavecrest is losing $150,000 annually on proposal inefficiencies. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, every proposal takes hours of manual labor. With our system, generate them in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just challenges. These are losses stacking up daily.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each minute spent on proposals is a minute not spent engaging clients. Wavecrest loses $50,000 annually in potential client interactions.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual proposals risk off-brand presentations. This inconsistency costs Wavecrest $20,000 in lost brand value each year.

problems.title: Human Error
problems.description: Errors in proposals lead to confusion and lost deals. Wavecrest misses out on $30,000 worth of contracts yearly due to mistakes.

problems.title: Opportunity Cost
problems.description: Focusing on proposals means less time for strategy. Wavecrest's strategic growth is stunted, costing $25,000 in missed opportunities.

problems.title: Lag Time
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround frustrates clients. Delays cost Wavecrest $15,000 annually in client goodwill and trust.

problems.title: Resource Misallocation
problems.description: Skilled staff are tied up in proposal preparation. This misallocation results in $10,000 in wasted resource potential each year.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system eliminates all these inefficiencies and losses.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to craft. Our system completes them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding varies with manual input. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand automatically.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual entries lead to errors. Our AI minimizes mistakes by automating data input.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Time on proposals steals from client interaction. Our solution frees up time for client-focused activities.

solutions.title: Optimal Resource Allocation
solutions.description: Staff are bogged down with proposals. Our system allows them to focus on high-value tasks.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Wavecrest's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Wavecrest around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Wavecrest.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Growth with Wavecrest's Strategic Insights
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our plan for Acme Corp involves optimizing every customer interaction to turn insights into measurable results. Let's enhance your online, in-store, and cross-platform presence.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to unoptimized customer engagement.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: With a current conversion rate of only 2%, Acme Corp is losing potential revenue from 98% of site visitors. This equates to thousands of dollars in lost sales every month.

problems.title: High Cart Abandonment
problems.description: Over 70% of shoppers abandon their carts on your site, representing a substantial loss in potential sales. This is a critical area for improvement.

problems.title: Inefficient Lead Nurturing
problems.description: Without a structured lead nurturing strategy, Acme Corp is missing out on converting interested prospects into loyal customers, leading to a significant loss in potential revenue.

problems.title: Poor Customer Retention
problems.description: Customer retention rates are currently below industry standards, resulting in a loss of recurring revenue and increased marketing costs to acquire new customers.

problems.title: Inconsistent Brand Messaging
problems.description: Inconsistent messaging across platforms dilutes brand identity, leading to a loss of customer trust and engagement.

problems.title: Underutilized Data Insights
problems.description: Without leveraging data insights effectively, Acme Corp is missing opportunities to tailor marketing strategies, leading to a loss of competitive advantage.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Wavecrest offers strategic solutions to address these revenue-impacting issues.

solutions.title: Customer Insight Analysis
solutions.description: Utilize comprehensive data analysis to understand customer behavior and improve engagement strategies.

solutions.title: E-commerce Optimization
solutions.description: Revamp your e-commerce platform to reduce cart abandonment and increase conversion rates.

solutions.title: Brand Messaging Strategy
solutions.description: Develop a cohesive brand messaging strategy to strengthen customer trust and loyalty.

solutions.title: Lead Nurturing Campaigns
solutions.description: Implement targeted lead nurturing campaigns to convert prospects into loyal customers.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Wavecrest is the partner you need to transform insights into action and drive results.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our success stories span multiple industries, showcasing our ability to deliver tangible results.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Services
whyUsCards.description: From strategy to execution, we provide a full suite of services tailored to your needs.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by data, ensuring informed decisions and measurable outcomes.

whyUsCards.title: Global Perspective
whyUsCards.description: With a diverse team, we bring a global perspective to every project, enhancing your reach and impact.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet Wavecrest's dedicated team of experts.

team.name: Taylor Collins
team.bio: Taylor leads the strategy and client relationships at Wavecrest, ensuring each project aligns with our clients' goals and drives results.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We delve into your current strategies and market position.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Craft a tailored strategy to meet your business goals.

process.title: Implementation

process.title: Review & Optimize
process.description: Analyze results and refine strategies for continuous improvement.
